name: Kate Berlant
bio: Kate Berlant is an American comedian, actress, and writer known for a surreal, largely improvised style that satirizes performance, self-importance, and the language of self-discovery. Her FX special Cinnamon in the Wind was directed by Bo Burnham, and she has collaborated extensively with John Early on stage and screen. She trained in performance studies at New York University before becoming a fixture of the alternative comedy scene.

timeline.ev: Named a New Face at Just For Laughs
Films Cinnamon in the Wind for FX
Would It Kill You to Laugh with John Early
Cinnamon in the Wind debuts on Hulu

Would It Kill You to Laugh nominated for Best Comedy Special at the Critics Choice Awards
